case_title: REGINALD DAVID WONG VS. YONG JU

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, REGINALD DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT JU, YONG
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2008 - JUDGMENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, REGINALD DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JU, YONG $1,830.65 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,890.65, IF JUDGMENT SATISFIED BY DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY REQUEST COURT TO VACATE JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,830.65 FILED BY WONG, REGINALD DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT JU, YONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2007 - CONTINUED TO JAN-29-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. SETTLEMENT NEGOTIATIONS PENDING. IF NO APPEARANCES, COURT WILL ENTER JUDGMENT IN THE SUM OF $1830.65 IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF, AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-09-2007, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JU, YONG
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JU, YONG
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2007 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO DEC-19-2007 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COMM PAUL SLAVIT. F. RAYRAY, CLERK. NOT REPORTED IN (506)
